name: Z-APE: Tower Defense
short_description: Z-Ape is a unique tower defense and first person shooter mash up game. Hordes of enemies attacking your base, it's up to you to stop them by placing towers or fighting them on FPS mode with guns, or both!
detailed_description:
Z-Ape is a unique tower defense and first person shooter mash up game. Hordes of enemies attacking your base, it's up to you to stop them either with your brain or your gun skills. You can build up a strategy, place towers for defense, meantime you can enter your tower and fire at enemies with unique weapons. You can be The Brain or The Brute or better : Both!

you Can Be the commander![
Placing towers and managing your resources are the keys for victory. Think it through, make a plan and execute it. Watch out for strategic places and use them to your advantage.

you Can Be the Warrior!
After putting some towers for support, you can take the matters on your hands and fight the hordes of enemies by yourself. Up close and personal! There are three classes and many weapon choices for your fighting style.

5 towers, 3 Guns
There are many ways to play this game, choose your way. You can build different strategies for each level.

10 Unique Levels
You can fight and build defenses on many levels, carefully designed and handcrafted.

more Ways to Play
There are 3 difficulty levels, endless modes and upcoming new maps.

supported_languages:
English*, Turkish, Russian, French, German
*languages with full audio support
